title: The Locked Section
description: As an Adept, you've earned access to the Athenaeum's restricted vault - the Locked Section. Archmage Elara has granted you permission to study one forbidden topic to advance your knowledge. But with great power comes great responsibility. What you learn may test your morality and loyalty to the Arcane Circle's principles.

objectives.description: Receive the vault key from Archmage Elara
Choose which forbidden topic to study
objectives.notes: Dialogue choice: Necromancy, Blood Magic, or Dimensional Travel

objectives.description: Perform a controlled field test of the forbidden magic
objectives.notes: Use the spell in a safe area

objectives.description: Decide how to use this dangerous knowledge
objectives.notes: Dialogue choice affects reputation and spell access

notes: First Adept quest. Moral choice quest with consequences. Rewards powerful forbidden spell based on player choice.
